title: loading backgrounds - complimentary reimagined
description: adds new loading backgrounds with outstanding visuals
body:
# important info
- this is a resourcepack adding several new loading screens with the use of [the loading backgrounds mod](https://modrinth.com/project/dH40biZd)
- the shader used is [complimentary reimagined](https://modrinth.com/project/HVnmMxH1)
- over 20 different loading backgrounds
